examples: She burned with an incandescence that had nothing to do with her looks.
The difference is that incandescence means “to shine from within.”
A light produced by a body heated to luminosity; incandescence.
The CRI gold standard is numerically 100, the color of pleasing Edison incandescence.
One thousand lumens from a CFL is visually harsh and makes food (and people) look ugly, compared with the same 1, 000 from Edison's incandescence.
